title: prestonia agglutinata
intro: Prestonia agglutinata is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or milkweed family. Traditionally, Prestonia agglutinata has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Prestonia agglutinata include the potential relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antitussive and expectorant. The herbal preparations of Prestonia agglutinata typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves or roots of the plant, which are then used to treat the aforementioned conditions.
